text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Matikanefukukitaru has a number
of victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Traineeer! I come with good news! Glad tidings!
Music to your ears!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The moment is finally upon us! Look at this
fortune slip, freshly pulled and opened!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She hands me a crisp, new fortune slip.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember when we won that raffle, but
the gods told us to wait a year? You know, for
the hot spring?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Well it's been a year, so I drew another fortune.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: This one says, "Eh, why not take that trip?"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Pretty direct for a fortune, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't really say one way or the other, but it
looks like the gods have finally given us their
blessing.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And when destiny beckons, we must answer its
call! ...Sure, this destiny beckoned nearly a year
ago, but there's no time like the present!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We don't have to worry about the Twinkle Series,
so let's get this hot spring trip of fortune started!
Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Pack your bags with lots of snacks, and let's start
making tracks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our bags stuffed to the brim with treats, we
set off on our hot spring vacation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... The water was so great. This place must
be what paradise feels like.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Did you notice the auspicious golden color of the
sulfur bath? Praise be on high!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer, did you have a nice, relaxing time too?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hoho! Your face certainly tells me you're all
loosened up! Now then...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's take it up a notch! Time to get this happy
bonanza started!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course! We're not here just to get all toasty in
the hot spring, you know!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course! We're not here just to get all toasty in
the hot spring, you know!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today we break free from the track and celebrate
our hard work with a joyous jubilee!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I want to throw a bash that will send even the
gods to seventh heaven!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Got that, Trainer?! Tonight, we're going to have
the happiest get-together, filled with lots of tea
and singing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's really getting into this... Could it be she's
been wanting to have a party this whole time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The "Oracle of Happiness" sure knows how to
celebrate. Or maybe this is just a side of her I had
never seen before.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, ma'am! We'll take a boatload of sushi
and one of every single special item on the menu!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And now, some entertainment to go with your
meal. Trainer, allow me to present to you my
one-Horsegirl show!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I start on the lavish feast,
Matikanefukukitaru begins an impersonation
routine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
For my first impression... An Umamusume who's
falling behind but still gives it her all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: "No waaay!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
For my next impression... The deadpan Suzuka
after she becomes a god!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: "I hope your wish comes true. Okay... bye."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And for my third impression... An Umamusume
tarot reading!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
"Huh?! I didn't even know 'The Sprinter' was part
of the tarot deck!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru fires off impressions one after
another, some hilarious, others baffling.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... And now, for impression number sixty-four... The god of war, Bishamonten... after falling into a pond...
choice_data_list:
Do you want to stop for a bit and eat
something?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Hmm? Oh, yeah. I guess I got a little carried
away there.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But first... I think it's time for a nap...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Worn out from a day of extreme fun, she nods off
on the spot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice something slip out of her hand while I'm
looking for a place for her to sleep.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a joke book containing every single one of her
impressions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's written down so much material... Her
handwriting is a little sloppy, and I can tell things
have been erased and rewritten many times over.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Trainer... There's still so much more fun ahead...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for everything you did for me... in the Twinkle Series... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The whole time I thought the "Oracle of
Happiness" wanted to throw down and party.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But all she wanted to do was to show her
appreciation...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Zzz... Snort! Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find somewhere for the greatest lucky goddess
around to snooze and then cover her with a
blanket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Matikanefukukitaru and I have
formed an irreplaceable bond during our time
together.
